executives.name: Abby Khandelwal
executives.background: Mr. Khandelwal joined B2Gold in 2024 as Chief Financial Officer. He previously served as CFO of Pretium Resources Inc.

executives.name: Jerry Korpan
executives.background: Mr. Korpan was formerly Executive Director of Yorkton Securities in London.

executives.name: Kevin Bullock
executives.background: Mr. Bullock is a registered Professional Mining Engineer and CEO of Signal Gold Inc.

executives.name: Randy Reichert
executives.background: Mr. Reichert joined Skeena in 2021 as COO and was appointed President and CEO in 2023. He is a mining engineer with over 30 years of experience, having previously served as VP Operations at B2Gold and in senior roles at Lundin Mining and Freeport-McMoRan.

executives.name: Robert Gayton
executives.background: Dr. Gayton is a Chartered Professional Accountant and has directed several public mining companies.

executives.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
executives.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: George Johnson
